UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -e; WINE=/usr/bin/wine; WINEPREFIX=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.wine\"; WINEARCH=win64; WINEDEBUG=-all; export WINEPREFIX WINEARCH WINEDEBUG; BASEDIR=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}\"; WINEBASE=\"{{$WineBaseDir}}\"; PAKSDIR=\"${BASEDIR}R5/Content/Paks\"; REPAK=\"${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/tools/bin/repak.exe\"; RETOC=\"${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/tools/bin/retoc.exe\"; WPJSON=\"${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/windrose_plus.json\"; OVERRIDES=\"${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/overrides\"; HASHFILE=\"${PAKSDIR}/.windroseplus_build.hash\"; GAMEPAK=\"${PAKSDIR}/pakchunk0-WindowsServer.pak\"; GAMEUTOC=\"${PAKSDIR}/pakchunk0-WindowsServer.utoc\"; if [[ ! -f \"$WPJSON\" ]]; then echo '[WindrosePlus] windrose_plus.json not found, skipping PAK rebuild'; exit 0; fi; HASCHANGED=0; python3 -c \"import json,sys; d=json.load(open('${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/windrose_plus.json')); m=d.get('multipliers',{}); sys.exit(0 if all(abs(v-1.0)<1e-6 for v in m.values()) else 1)\" 2>/dev/null && HASCHANGED=0 || HASCHANGED=1; if [[ $HASCHANGED -eq 0 ]]; then echo '[WindrosePlus] No multiplier overrides, skipping PAK rebuild'; exit 0; fi; CURHASH=$(cat \"$WPJSON\" | md5sum | cut -d' ' -f1); PREVHASH=$(cat \"$HASHFILE\" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ \"$CURHASH\" == \"$PREVHASH\" && -f \"${PAKSDIR}/WindrosePlus_Multipliers_P.pak\" ]]; then echo '[WindrosePlus] Config unchanged, skipping PAK rebuild'; exit 0; fi; echo '[WindrosePlus] Building Multipliers PAK...'; if [[ ! -d \"$OVERRIDES\" ]]; then mkdir -p \"$OVERRIDES\"; fi; $WINE \"$REPAK\" pack \"${WINEBASE}windrose_plus\\overrides\\\" \"${WINEBASE}R5\\Content\\Paks\\WindrosePlus_Multipliers_P.pak\" && echo '[WindrosePlus] Multipliers PAK built OK' || { echo '[WindrosePlus] repak failed'; exit 1; }; CTCACHE=\"${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/curvetable_cache\"; AESKEY=$(python3 -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('${BASEDIR}windrose_plus/windrose_plus.json')); print(d.get('aes_key',''))\" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ -n \"$AESKEY\" && -f \"$GAMEUTOC\" && -f \"$RETOC\" ]]; then if [[ ! -d \"$CTCACHE\" ]] || [[ \"$GAMEPAK\" -nt \"$CTCACHE\" ]]; then echo '[WindrosePlus] Extracting CurveTables with retoc (Wine)...'; rm -rf \"$CTCACHE\"; mkdir -p \"$CTCACHE\"; $WINE \"$RETOC\" -a \"$AESKEY\" to-legacy \"${WINEBASE}R5\\Content\\Paks\\pakchunk0-WindowsServer.utoc\" \"${WINEBASE}windrose_plus\\curvetable_cache\\\" && echo '[WindrosePlus] CurveTable extraction OK' || echo '[WindrosePlus] retoc extraction failed (non-fatal)'; fi; else echo '[WindrosePlus] Skipping CurveTable PAK (no AES key or retoc not available)'; fi; echo \"$CURHASH\" > \"$HASHFILE\"; echo '[WindrosePlus] PAK rebuild complete'"
